title: Cornwall (Eastern Ontario) - Canada.ca
content:
## Cornwall Eastern Ontario

## Cornwall Eastern Ontario
Cornwall, one of Eastern Ontario’s largest cities, is a charming city nestled on the shores of the Saint Lawrence River. It is known for its rich historical heritage, particularly because of the Cornwall Canal, which is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The city’s many parks and outdoor facilities make it an ideal place to raise a family. Cornwall is also known for its friendly people and diverse economy. Its strategic location, close to Montreal, Ottawa and the US border, makes it a key junction for trade and cultural exchange.
